rationale: The unresolved US-Iran deal keeps energy price uncertainty relevant for Romania; no new Black Sea or regional security developments this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Unresolved Iran deal prolongs oil and gas price uncertainty, which directly affects Romanian energy costs and household budgets.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues (background)
top_events.summary: No qualitative escalation near Romania's border this cycle; Black Sea situation remains at established background level.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Minor EU-adjacent political event; no meaningful impact on Romanian residents or regional dynamics.
